title: Agency
description: A federal agency with CFR references as returned by the eCFR Admin API.

name.description: Full name of the federal agency.

display_name.description: Display-friendly name including parent department context.

sortable_name.description: Inverted name used for alphabetical sorting (e.g., 'Agriculture, Department of').

slug.description: URL-safe slug identifier for the agency.

children.description: Sub-agencies that belong to this parent agency.

cfr_references.description: CFR title and chapter references associated with this agency.

CfrReference.description: A reference to a specific CFR title and chapter.

chapter.description: CFR chapter identifier (Roman numeral or digit).
